text: I know tomorrow feels big, and it makes sense that your mind is racing a little tonight. Whatever you're feeling right now is completely okay. The people taking care of you tomorrow do this with skill and care, and you are in good hands. Try to rest as best you can, let yourself be looked after, and know that I'm thinking of you and holding you close in my heart. This will pass, and I'll be right here waiting for you on the other side of it.
